about_item: COLLAPSIBLE PAWD WITH PET BED - You and your pup will love this foldable dog crate and its comfy velvet mat - designed to fit into the PAWD perfectly whether assembled or folded down. Bundle care is easy: just wipe the PAWD clean or hose it down, and machine wash the bed.

LIGHTWEIGHT AND TRAVEL-FRIENDLY - Weighing in at just 9 lbs, this nesting space for your fur baby can be easily carried and lifted into your car anytime you need to provide them with a familiar home away from home. Set up or stow away in just 1 minute.

MADE FOR PET AND PAWRENT SAFETY - Our hard plastic dog crate is constructed of BPA-free, non-toxic ABS plastic that is thinner due to superior strength. There are no sharp edges, or corners, and the door can stay open or lock as needed (not for escape artists).

COORDINATES WITH YOUR HOME DECOR - This beautifully designed resting area blends effortlessly into your stylish home. The crate's sleek, modern pattern helps balance airflow and light with a den-like environment while helping prevent injury to paws and jaws.

KEEP YOUR FUR BABY COZY AND CALM - The small PAWD provides dogs up to 12 lbs. with the perfect nap spot, day or night. It measures 21 x 16 x 15.75 inches assembled and 21 x 3.5 x 15.75 inches when collapsed flat for space-saving storage when not in use.

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate easy to assemble and appreciate its sleek design, with one noting it looks more like furniture than a crate. They praise its portability for travel, lightweight construction, and suitability for apartment living, with one mentioning it works well for a 4.5 lb Chi. The build quality and comfort receive mixed reviews, with some finding it well-made and comfortable, while others report it's not sturdy and uncomfortable.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect Small Crate for Travel & Everyday Use
authors_reviews.text: I’ve tried a few portable dog crates, and the PAWD is by far my favorite. It’s the perfect small crate for apartments, road trips, and even hotel stays. The design is super sleek and doesn’t look bulky or out of place in my home.What really sold me is how easy it is to collapse. It folds down quickly for storage or travel, which makes packing so much simpler. I love that I can bring it along without it taking up half my trunk.If you’re looking for a crate that’s perfect for travel, lightweight, and actually well-designed, this is it. My dog feels safe and comfortable inside, and I love how convenient it is for on-the-go life. Highly recommend!
authors_reviews.author: Amazon1

authors_reviews.title: Cute & functional dog crate
authors_reviews.text: Bought this for our dog Stella and she loves it. It was incredibly easy to set up, feels really well made, and doesn’t look like a typical dog crate sitting in our living room. The washable bed is a huge plus, and we love that it collapses down easily when we need to store it or take it with us. So nice to finally have something functional that also looks beautiful in our home.
authors_reviews.author: Drew D.

authors_reviews.title: Not worth the price
authors_reviews.text: It really is just plastic, couple piece broke off while installing but still works. It's not worth the price.
authors_reviews.author: Taylor

authors_reviews.title: More comfy!!!
authors_reviews.text: I love this!!! So easy to put together.. moved my Pippy into it tonight.. it is so spacious and light and airy!! So much better than the wire crate. Pippy is a yorkie, 1.5 pounds so lots of room to grow! Get this!!
authors_reviews.author: Trish Niedorowski

authors_reviews.title: The cushion is DANGEROUS
authors_reviews.text: Liked the look, but please be warned: the provided cushion is easily ripped apart and there is this strange solid ‘bark like’ material in it. We came home to a complete mess, but it wasn’t poop! It was all from the cushion. I have no idea if it’s toxic- very disappointed.
authors_reviews.author: JulieT

authors_reviews.title: It’s just OK
authors_reviews.text: I got the small in white. It looks nice in our living room. It wasn’t the easiest to assemble but I got it done (I’m not handy at all). It feels like thin, cheap (non-sturdy) plastic and it makes noise like it’s flimsy when my girl goes in while escaping her bigger brother. (I got a different brand for her brother that is well-made and doesn’t make noise when they’re a little rough inside.) The latch isn’t easy to close and takes some doing to snap it shut. If the other brand made a smaller version, I’d return this one. It’s nice that it comes with a machine washable soft pad, though. I use a lightweight portable playpen to travel, so I don’t use this to travel; therefore I can’t really attest to the ease and durability of constant disassembly and reassembly. She’s a 7 lb Jack Russell and it’s a perfect fit for her size.
authors_reviews.author: GatorB8t

authors_reviews.title: Awesome Crate to Pamper my Pup!
authors_reviews.text: I’ve tried a few small dog crates over the years, but the Kindtail small dog crate is hands down the best looking one we tried.My dog took to it right away and I love how it collapses. It took few tries to set up and fold away quickly but now it’s super easy to travel with any where we go. I use the crate for the car rides and camping. I put my dog in there as he goes nuts with anxiety in the car.I ordered a second one for my cat as she needs this for car rides as well. Overall I am very happy with the portability of this crate. The only thing I wish is that it came with a carrying bag.
authors_reviews.author: Joseph

authors_reviews.title: Great crate- pad not so sturdy
authors_reviews.text: I love these crates! They are so easy to assemble and break down for travel. I also think they look more like furniture than a crate which great. My only complaint is that my 10lb dog was easily able to rip apart the pad that comes within the crates. I was so thankful she didn’t chew on it and choke but as nice as the pads look, for the price I would hope they would be more difficult to rip apart.
authors_reviews.author: Dominique V
